name: s7g-depin-router
description: Routes inference requests to the cheapest/best DePIN provider (Akash, Bittensor, Render, ICP) based on cost, latency, model availability, and trust requirements.

skills.name: Route to Best Provider
skills.description: Select optimal DePIN provider for inference request based on cost, latency, model, and trust requirements

skills.name: Optimize Cost/Latency
skills.description: Analyze provider pricing and latency to recommend optimal routing strategy

skills.name: Check Provider Health
skills.description: Check health status of all configured DePIN providers
